assets.prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: ReelForge demo scene background, 16:9 landscape PNG, 1536x864 or larger. Primary request: Abstract DOM layers transforming into a clean video frame grid inside a technical render lab, deterministic and precise. Scene/backdrop: dark neutral deterministic render laboratory, modular HTML layers represented only as translucent geometric panes and nested rectangles. Subject: floating unlabeled layer stack morphing into an empty frame grid, precise alignment, no code syntax anywhere. Style/medium: premium cinematic 3D technical render, clean agency-grade polish, realistic materials with abstract data-light accents. Composition/framing: wide 16:9 frame, layer stack on left transitioning to grid on right, center kept visually clean for later HTML overlay. Lighting/mood: crisp dark studio lighting, signal-green traces, warm amber checkpoints, shallow depth. Color palette: matte charcoal, graphite, black glass, signal green, subtle amber, cool steel. Constraints: no visible text; no letters; no numbers; no readable UI; no glyphs; no labels; no logos; no watermarks; no browser chrome labels; no code; all text belongs to later HTML layers. Avoid: typography, source code, pseudo-code, fake UI words, alphabetic shapes, numerals, signage, watermarks, brand marks, icons with letters, tiny interface labels.

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: ReelForge demo scene background, 16:9 landscape PNG, 1536x864 or larger. Primary request: Modular scene blocks docking into one long timeline rail, subcomposition architecture visualized as physical precision modules. Scene/backdrop: deterministic render laboratory, dark matte workbench, technical timeline instrument with no labels. Subject: several unlabeled rectangular scene modules sliding into a single glowing horizontal rail, precise physical alignment, abstract connectors only. Style/medium: cinematic high-end 3D technical render, premium agency production mood, clean mechanical detail. Composition/framing: wide 16:9 frame, timeline rail spans horizontally, modules staggered in depth, room for later HTML overlay. Lighting/mood: controlled dark studio light, signal-green traces along the rail, warm amber checkpoint glows, crisp depth. Color palette: matte charcoal, graphite, black glass, signal green, warm amber, brushed steel. Constraints: no visible text; no letters; no numbers; no readable UI; no glyphs; no labels; no logos; no watermarks; no timeline tick numbers; all words will be HTML layers later. Avoid: typography, alphabetic symbols, numerals, fake labels, code, filenames, signage, watermarks, brand marks, icons containing letters.
